name: Shadow Boxing
instructions: 3 rounds of 1 min light shadow boxing. Focus on movement, not power.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Continuous skipping for 3 minutes. Vary footwork between rounds.

name: Dynamic Stretching Circuit
instructions: Leg swings, arm circles, hip rotations, high knees. 30 sec each.

name: Partner Tag
instructions: Pairs try to touch each other's shoulders while defending.

name: Static Stretching
instructions: Hold each stretch 20–30 sec. Focus: hamstrings, quads, hips, shoulders.

name: Breathing & Mindset
instructions: Seated. Coach asks 1–2 questions about what was learned. Finish with bow-out.

name: Burpee Rounds
instructions: 3 x 30-sec burpee sets with 20-sec rest. Modify for beginners.

name: Core Circuit
instructions: Plank 30s, sit-ups x 20, leg raises x 15. 2 rounds.

name: Shuttle Runs
instructions: 5m sprint, touch, return x 6. Builds explosive footwork and cardio.

name: Box Step Drill
instructions: Step forward-right-back-left in a square. Maintain guard and posture.

name: Cone Weave
instructions: Set 5 cones 1m apart. Weave in and out x 4. Add a strike at the end.

name: Angle Exit Drill
instructions: Partner jabs, defender exits at 45° angle alternating. No crossing feet.

name: Slip & Roll
instructions: Partner throws slow punches, defender slips inside and outside. 2 min each side.

name: Parry Drills
instructions: One feeds straight punches, other parries with rear hand. Switch after 1 min.

name: Cover & Counter
instructions: Block incoming hook with high cover, immediately return with 2-punch counter.

name: Jab-Cross-Hook
instructions: On pads or bag: Jab → Cross → Hook. 3 x 1-min rounds.

name: 4-Punch Combination
instructions: Jab → Cross → Lead Hook → Rear Uppercut. Emphasise hip rotation.

name: Feint & Attack
instructions: Fake jab then attack with cross or hook. 2 min rounds on pads.

name: Jab Mechanics
instructions: Break down the jab: extension, shoulder roll, snap back. Mirror or shadowbox.

name: Bob & Weave
instructions: Dip under a string or partner's arm. Practice U-shape movement. 3 x 1-min.

name: Body Shot Setup
instructions: Jab to head then drop and cross to body. Bend knees, not waist.

name: Southpaw vs Orthodox
instructions: Pair southpaw and orthodox. Controlled 2-min rounds, focus stance advantages.

name: Kihon Blocks & Strikes
instructions: Line drill: gedan barai, age uke, gyaku-zuki. Count and correct in unison.

name: Kata Breakdown
instructions: Focus on 1 kata sequence (4–6 moves). Break into bunkai with a partner.

name: Kumite Entry Drill
instructions: From fighting stance: entry jab or gyaku-zuki + exit. Alternate 1-min rounds.

name: Maai (Distance Control)
instructions: Partners maintain correct fighting distance while moving. One leads, one mirrors.

name: Karate Defence Sequence
instructions: Partner attacks with gyaku-zuki, defender uses age uke then counters. 10 reps each side.

name: Thai Kick Mechanics
instructions: Slow breakdown: pivot foot, hip rotation, shin contact. Repeat both sides.

name: Teep (Push Kick)
instructions: Chamber, extend, push through. 2 x 1-min each leg.

name: Clinch Entry & Knee
instructions: Jab-cross, close to clinch, deliver 2 controlled knees, exit with push.

name: Low Kick Counter
instructions: Check partner's low kick, immediately counter with your own. 2 min each side.

name: Muay Thai Sparring
instructions: Light technical rounds — punches, kicks, knees. Controlled intent.

name: Guard Passing Drill
instructions: Torreando or knee-slice pass. Guard player frames and moves hips. 3 min each.

name: Hip Escape (Shrimping)
instructions: Solo shrimping down the mat. Push off one leg and turn hips. 3 lengths.

name: Armbar from Guard
instructions: Control posture, isolate arm, pivot, extend hips. Drill slow x 5 each side.

name: Side Control Positional
instructions: Start from side control. Bottom escapes, top maintains. 2-min rounds.

name: Sprawl Defense
instructions: Attacker shoots double leg, defender sprawls and looks to take back.

name: Dirty Boxing in Clinch
instructions: Short punches and knees from clinch. 2-punch combos before resetting.

name: Takedown & Ground & Pound
instructions: Shoot for takedown, pass to half guard, controlled GnP combo x 4. Switch.

name: Range Management
instructions: Stay outside grappling range while landing punches/kicks. Pivot on takedown.

name: Sprawl Drill
instructions: Partner feigns shoot, defender sprawls hard. 10 reps, switch. Hips down.

name: MMA Pad Combo
instructions: Jab-cross-kick on pads. Coach calls: level change, takedown, or stand-up.
